# Scenario: Double permission — two permission.asked events arrive simultaneously
# Source: Real debug log (2026-03-07). Session ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt.
#
# Flow:
#   1. User sends message (git push twice + output abcdefg 10 times)
#   2. Session becomes busy, assistant message created
#   3. Streaming text deltas arrive
#   4. Two bash tool parts created (pending)
#   5. Text finalized
#   6. First tool starts running (git push)
#   7. TWO permission.asked events arrive back-to-back (both for "git push")
#   8. Second tool also starts running
#   9. User allows first permission → tool completes
#  10. First tool completes with error output
#
# This tests the double-permission popup edge case where two permissions
# are asked simultaneously for the same session.
# (load-file (expand-file-name "../../test-helper.el" (file-name-directory buffer-file-name)))
# (load-file (expand-file-name "../../opencode-scenario-test.el" (file-name-directory buffer-file-name)))
# (opencode-scenario-run-file buffer-file-name)

:session ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt
:directory /Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el

# Mock APIs
:api POST /session/ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt/prompt_async 204 null
:api POST /permission/per_cc7994138001RH1HT5SIIASRfM/reply 200 true

# --- User sends message ---

:eval (opencode-chat--send "you have to follow my instruction to do the follow stuff.\n    1. all operation should within a message.\n    2. then run bash with `git push` twice\n    3. output \"abcdefg\" 10 times in one line")

# --- SSE: user message created ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_cc79908a5001QuYEUxwZ0B0iBP","sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","role":"user","time":{"created":1772875221157},"agent":"Sisyphus (Ultraworker)","model":{"providerID":"Ttadk","modelID":"claude-opus-4-6"}}}}}

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc79908a5002ehq0bhUK4WS47A","sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","messageID":"msg_cc79908a5001QuYEUxwZ0B0iBP","type":"text","text":"you have to follow my instruction to do the follow stuff.\n    1. all operation should within a message.\n    2. then run bash with `git push` twice\n    3. output \"abcdefg\" 10 times in one line"}}}}

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"session.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","slug":"eager-forest","version":"0.0.0","projectID":"d2dea25e","directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","title":"New session","time":{"created":1772874936230,"updated":1772875221197}}}}}

# --- Session becomes busy ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","status":{"type":"busy"}}}}

:assert-busy

# --- Assistant message created ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_cc79908f1001LhN5AIt9O72NLr","sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1772875221233},"parentID":"msg_cc79908a5001QuYEUxwZ0B0iBP","modelID":"claude-opus-4-6","providerID":"Ttadk","mode":"Sisyphus (Ultraworker)","agent":"Sisyphus (Ultraworker)","path":{"cwd":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","root":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el"},"cost":0,"tokens":{"input":0,"output":0,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}}

# --- Session title updated ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"session.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","slug":"eager-forest","version":"0.0.0","projectID":"d2dea25e","directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","title":"Git push twice + output abcdefg 10 times","time":{"created":1772874936230,"updated":1772875221207}}}}}

# --- User message summary + session diff ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_cc79908a5001QuYEUxwZ0B0iBP","sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","role":"user","time":{"created":1772875221157},"summary":{"diffs":[]},"agent":"Sisyphus (Ultraworker)","model":{"providerID":"Ttadk","modelID":"claude-opus-4-6"}}}}}

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"session.diff","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","diff":[]}}}

# --- Step start ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc79935f7001ZZHAwnCeMDDMC5","sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","messageID":"msg_cc79908f1001LhN5AIt9O72NLr","type":"step-start","snapshot":"cdbd46f2387d878214bf7aff4361bf7804600862"}}}}

# --- Streaming text deltas ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc79935f8001uJIszrWOgzs8is","sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","messageID":"msg_cc79908f1001LhN5AIt9O72NLr","type":"text","text":"\n\nI detect","time":{"start":1772875232760}},"delta":"\n\nI detect"}}}

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc79935f8001uJIszrWOgzs8is","sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","messageID":"msg_cc79908f1001LhN5AIt9O72NLr","type":"text","text":"\n\nI detect **explicit instruction** intent — you've given me 3 specific steps to execute in sequence. My approach: execute directly.\n\nLet me do all three:","time":{"start":1772875232760}},"delta":" **explicit instruction** intent — you've given me 3 specific steps to execute in sequence. My approach: execute directly.\n\nLet me do all three:"}}}

:assert-contains I detect

# --- Tool: bash git push #1 (pending) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc7993bf60015aZgAqakFZy14D","sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","messageID":"msg_cc79908f1001LhN5AIt9O72NLr","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_01PxVgb6xKLZps8tmJNx6x4m","tool":"bash","state":{"status":"pending","input":{},"raw":""}}}}}

# --- Tool: bash git push #2 (pending) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc7993e04001G7FSw4QFFuVof6","sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","messageID":"msg_cc79908f1001LhN5AIt9O72NLr","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_01FfezigSd5dRjoNqmp9Vkqo","tool":"bash","state":{"status":"pending","input":{},"raw":""}}}}}

# --- Text finalized ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc79935f8001uJIszrWOgzs8is","sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","messageID":"msg_cc79908f1001LhN5AIt9O72NLr","type":"text","text":"\n\nI detect **explicit instruction** intent — you've given me 3 specific steps to execute in sequence. My approach: execute directly.\n\nLet me do all three:","time":{"start":1772875235430,"end":1772875235430}}}}}

# --- Tool #1 starts running ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc7993bf60015aZgAqakFZy14D","sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","messageID":"msg_cc79908f1001LhN5AIt9O72NLr","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_01PxVgb6xKLZps8tmJNx6x4m","tool":"bash","state":{"status":"running","input":{"command":"git push","description":"First git push"},"time":{"start":1772875235438}}}}}}

# --- TWO permission.asked events arrive back-to-back ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"permission.asked","properties":{"id":"per_cc7994138001RH1HT5SIIASRfM","sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","permission":"bash","patterns":["git push"],"metadata":{},"always":["git push*"],"tool":{"messageID":"msg_cc79908f1001LhN5AIt9O72NLr","callID":"toolu_vrtx_01PxVgb6xKLZps8tmJNx6x4m"}}}}

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"permission.asked","properties":{"id":"per_cc79941b90010VFqjQG6u9o6MC","sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","permission":"bash","patterns":["git push"],"metadata":{},"always":["git push*"],"tool":{"messageID":"msg_cc79908f1001LhN5AIt9O72NLr","callID":"toolu_vrtx_01FfezigSd5dRjoNqmp9Vkqo"}}}}

# First permission popup should be displayed
:assert-contains git push

# --- User allows first permission ---
# Simulate the real race condition: the SSE permission.replied event
# arrives DURING the sync HTTP POST (via accept-process-output re-entrancy).
# In real usage, on-replied fires inside the --reply call, causing
# double cleanup that wipes the second permission popup.
#
# We simulate this by:
#   1. Stubbing opencode-api--request to fire the SSE on-replied handler
#      mid-call (before --reply's own cleanup runs)
#   2. Then calling allow-once which triggers the stub

:eval (goto-char (point-max))
:eval (let ((orig-fn (symbol-function 'opencode-api--request))) (cl-letf (((symbol-function 'opencode-api--request) (lambda (&rest args) (opencode-permission--on-replied (list :type "permission.replied" :properties (list :sessionID "ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt" :requestID "per_cc7994138001RH1HT5SIIASRfM" :reply "once"))) nil))) (opencode-permission--allow-once)))

# After dismissing first permission, the second permission popup
# should appear automatically (queue drain).
# BUG: the re-entrant on-replied handler shows the second popup,
# but then --reply's own cleanup wipes it.
:assert-contains Permission Required

# Verify the current permission is the SECOND one (different ID)
:eval (should (equal (plist-get opencode-permission--current :id) "per_cc79941b90010VFqjQG6u9o6MC"))


# --- Tool #2 starts running ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc7993e04001G7FSw4QFFuVof6","sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","messageID":"msg_cc79908f1001LhN5AIt9O72NLr","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_01FfezigSd5dRjoNqmp9Vkqo","tool":"bash","state":{"status":"running","input":{"command":"git push","description":"Second git push"},"time":{"start":1772875235774}}}}}}

# --- Server confirms first permission replied ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"permission.replied","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","requestID":"per_cc7994138001RH1HT5SIIASRfM","reply":"once"}}}

# --- Tool #1 running with output ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc7993bf60015aZgAqakFZy14D","sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","messageID":"msg_cc79908f1001LhN5AIt9O72NLr","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_01PxVgb6xKLZps8tmJNx6x4m","tool":"bash","state":{"status":"running","input":{"command":"git push","description":"First git push"},"metadata":{"output":"fatal: The upstream branch of your current branch does not match\nthe name of your current branch.\n","description":"First git push"},"time":{"start":1772875244750}}}}}}

# --- Tool #1 completed ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc7993bf60015aZgAqakFZy14D","sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","messageID":"msg_cc79908f1001LhN5AIt9O72NLr","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_01PxVgb6xKLZps8tmJNx6x4m","tool":"bash","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"command":"git push","description":"First git push"},"output":"fatal: The upstream branch of your current branch does not match\nthe name of your current branch.\n","title":"First git push","metadata":{"output":"fatal: The upstream branch of your current branch does not match\nthe name of your current branch.\n","exit":128,"description":"First git push","truncated":false},"time":{"start":1772875235438,"end":1772875244754}}}}}}

# --- Final assertions ---
:assert-busy
:assert-contains I detect
:assert-contains git push
